headline: Is Automatic Data Processing (ADP) A Better Stock Than PAYX and WDAY
summary: Is ADP a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Automatic Data Processing, Inc. on Contrarian Indicator’s Substack by Cameron Fen. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ADP. Automatic Data Processing, Inc.’s share was trading at $253.31 as of July 16th. ADP’s trailing and forward P/E were 23.93 and […]
